classes.name: aiou.mem.cache.CacheHolder

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CacheHolder.value
documentation: get cached value

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CacheHolder.update
documentation: update cached value and refresh expired times

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CacheHolder.is_alive
documentation: check whether this cache needs updating

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CacheHolder.is_deprecated
documentation: check whether this cache can be purged

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CacheHolder.renewal
documentation: refresh expired times
Holder for caching value

classes.name: aiou.mem.cache.CachePool

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CachePool.all_keys
documentation: get all cache keys

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CachePool.update
documentation: update: key -> holder(value)

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CachePool.erase
documentation: erase value holder with key

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CachePool.fetch
documentation: fetch value & holder with key

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CachePool.purge
documentation: remove all expired cache holders
Pool for cache holders

classes.name: aiou.mem.cache.CacheManager

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CacheManager.all_names
documentation: get names of all pools

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CacheManager.get_pool
documentation: get pool with name

methods.name: aiou.mem.cache.CacheManager.purge

classes.name: aiou.dos.path.Path

methods.name: aiou.dos.path.Path.add
documentation: add system path

Paths for main script
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
#! /usr/bin/env python3
import os
import sys
path = os.path.abspath(__file__)
path = os.path.dirname(path)
path = os.path.dirname(path)
sys.path.insert(0, path)
